# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report a security vulnerability in `ries-rs`, please use GitHub's private
security advisory workflow:

**[Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/maxwellsantoro/ries-rs/security/advisories/new)**

Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

We will acknowledge your report within a reasonable time and work with you to
address the issue before any public disclosure.
